verses.1: Help, LORD; for the godly man ceases.
verses.3: May the LORD cut off all flattering lips,
verses.4: who have said, “With our tongue we will prevail.
verses.5: “Because of the oppression of the weak and because of the groaning of the needy,
verses.6: The LORD’s words are flawless words,
verses.8: The wicked walk on every side,
